_template: verdict.json - emitted by the episteme:verifying-against-contract skill (Voice 2, the Verifier), one per implementer turn. The values below are a worked example (the 'green nobody predicted' case): the oracle passed but the implementer did not predict it, so kind=mismatch even though progress_delta=+1. Replace the values; keep the field meaning. Remove the _field_docs block in real output, or keep it - it is ignored by consumers.
reason: oracle passed (1 passed, exit 0) but implementer predicted it would still fail because the refresh path was untouched - the green is unexplained

_field_docs.turn_index: Loop turn this verdict belongs to (freshness). Matches the implementer's turn.
_field_docs.contract_id: The contract.md this criterion lives in, e.g. 'contract-auth'.
_field_docs.criterion_id: The acceptance criterion under test this turn, e.g. 'AC-2'. null only if the change targeted no contract criterion.
_field_docs.oracle: The exact cheap-oracle command that was RUN FRESH this turn (test/type/lint/build). null when the criterion has no oracle (then kind=noop and the contract gap is flagged).
_field_docs.kind: FACT label, one of: passed | failed | mismatch | noop | regression. NEVER a quality judgment. 'passed' requires BOTH a green oracle AND a matched prediction; an unpredicted green is 'mismatch'. 'failed' = oracle did not pass. 'noop' = no oracle-state change (or no oracle exists). 'regression' = a previously-green contract criterion is now red.
_field_docs.reason: One sentence citing the concrete oracle output (counts + exit code) and the prediction comparison. No 'should'/'seems'/quality words.
_field_docs.invalidates_hypothesis: true when the oracle outcome falsifies what the implementer believed (a mismatch, or a failure the implementer predicted as a pass). The loop retires that hypothesis instead of retrying it. A predicted red in a red-green cycle is NOT invalidating.
_field_docs.progress_delta: Integer, CONTRACT-ORACLE STATE ONLY. +1 when a contract criterion's oracle flips red->green this turn; -1 when a green one regresses to red; 0 otherwise. NEVER moved by 'the prediction matched', by a non-contract test, by an already-green oracle, or by effort.
_field_docs.flags: Orthogonal facts that stack, independent of kind: ORACLE_PASSED, ORACLE_FAILED, PREDICTION_MISMATCH, REGRESSION, STATE_REVISITED. ORACLE_PASSED + PREDICTION_MISMATCH is the canonical 'green you did not understand' (kind=mismatch).
